title: Egnak, Michael   - POSSESSION OF A CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE
summary: On March 23, 2026, Upper Southampton PD conducted a traffic stop of a vehicle operated by Michael Egnak on the 1700 block of Industrial Boulevard. The subsequent investigation revealed Egnak was in possession of controlled substances and other drug paraphernalia.
